neither north indian or south indian but there is some truth to what op mentioned about the superiority complex quite a lot of northies have about hindi the nonsense propagated by whatsapp university about hindi being the national language of india hasn t helped matters also the hindutva project rests on the theme of one nation one religion one language one everything and the project has its tentacles properly around north india that being said there are a lot of north indians in the south who have learnt the local language and have assimilated effortlessly wherever they have stayed largely the marwadi community last point the friction we see on news is mostly driven by the it cell check the coverage by mainstream media on the fictional tamil nadu bihar fights just bjp s usual division tactics they demonized kerala before now they are targeting tamil nadu they have no hope of winning in both of those states so might as well make them villains for their hindi audience
